preflight_quotes.items_js_healing_salve: healing_salve: { id: 'healing_salve', name: 'Healing Salve', description: 'Anti-inflammatory salve for cuts and scrapes. Heals over time.', icon: '🧴', category: 'crafted', stackable: true, effectType: 'anti_inflammatory' }
preflight_quotes.recipes_js_outputs: plant_composite recipe: output: 'plant_composite', outcomeObservationId: 'composite_created'; protective_coating recipe: output: 'protective_coating', outcomeObservationId: 'coating_applied' (both category: 'biology').
preflight_quotes.quests_js_narrative: perfect_composite quest teaches 'A composite combines two materials to get properties neither has alone... fiber carries load, the matrix holds the fibers in place'; desert_coating quest teaches 'Coatings protect by creating a barrier... Reflective coatings bounce heat. Hydrophobic coatings repel water.'
preflight_quotes.recipe_registry: bootstrapRegistry() reads `getRecipesByCategory('biology')` from data/recipes.js and wraps each def in a Recipe instance — recipe.output is the itemId string used as the produced item key.
preflight_quotes.inventory_system: resolveInventory uses ITEMS[id] || fallbackItem(id); fallbackItem builds a generic display from the id string (replaces _ with space, title-cases) — so missing items.js entries surface as raw-style ids with the 📦 emoji.
preflight_quotes.swarm_orchestrator: Orchestrator picks one of A) dispatch next agent, B) stop at human gate, C) resolve blocker, D) report status — never more than one per turn.

notes.recipe_resolution_check: perfect_composite output 'plant_composite' now resolves to items.js entry; desert_coating output 'protective_coating' same. Verified via grep: RECIPES.plant_composite.output === 'plant_composite' and RECIPES.protective_coating.output === 'protective_coating' both present in data/recipes.js, and matching ITEMS keys now exist in data/items.js.
notes.field_parity_detail: Both new entries use the exact 7 fields healing_salve uses (id, name, description, icon, category, stackable, effectType). No new fields introduced. effectType values: plant_composite='structural' (new value, not new field — plant_composite is structural rather than physiological); protective_coating='protective' (matches existing sun_balm value). Category: 'crafted' for both, matching healing_salve.
guardrails_observed: did not add new categories or fields
